training_config.validation_provenance: Rows marked dataset_split_hint=training_only are assigned only to training. Validation, blind, and stress benchmarks are drawn from unhinted parent rows. Stress hardness threshold is computed only from unhinted benchmark-eligible rows.
training_config.blind_provenance: Rows marked dataset_split_hint=training_only are assigned only to training. Validation, blind, and stress benchmarks are drawn from unhinted parent rows. Stress hardness threshold is computed only from unhinted benchmark-eligible rows.
training_config.stress_provenance: Rows marked dataset_split_hint=training_only are assigned only to training. Validation, blind, and stress benchmarks are drawn from unhinted parent rows. Stress hardness threshold is computed only from unhinted benchmark-eligible rows.
